[ See details ] Tending Why RiA Ecosystem The challenge today: robotics is powerful but fragmented. Companies face steep learning curves, complex integrations, and high costs.Our answer: RiA Ecosystem brings everything together in one hub – connecting robotics across industries, simplifying adoption, and making advanced automation within reach for every company. How our ecosystem benefits RiA Ecosystem empowers multiple industries to work smarter: Robotic Welding – adaptive processes, faster setups, higher consistency. Palletizing & Intralogistics – flexible flows for modern supply chains. CNC Tending – reliable and autonomous machine operations. Industrial & Facility Cleaning – intelligent navigation and centralized scheduling. Inspection & Quality – AI-driven detection, monitoring, and traceability. Custom Cells – seamless integration for hybrid and unique processes How RiA Ecosystem works Connect robots, PLCs, and sensors seamlessly.Configure applications with guided templates.Program intuitively with low-code and AI support.Monitor performance through real-time dashboards.Manage & Scale across teams, sites, and fleets. The RiA promise RiA Ecosystem stands on five principles:Accessibility – robotics without barriers.Transparency – clear insights and real-time visibility.Scalability – from one robot to entire networks.Future-proofing – AI-driven, integration-ready.Confidence – built on secure, industry-grade standards. Call to vision RiA Ecosystem is more than a platform – it’s a movement towards smarter, connected, and accessible robotics. The future of automation is open to those who dare to take the first step. FAQ What is RiA Ecosystem? A unified hub designed to connect, program, monitor, and manage robotic solutions across industries. Which robots and PLCs are supported? Integration across multiple vendors via standard protocols and dedicated connectors. How can I engage today? By staying informed, connecting with us, and preparing your company for the next step in automation. Why RiA Ecosystem now? Because the future of robotics belongs to those who move first. RiA Ecosystem – the future of robotics begins with a single step. Login or Register to view price ​Request price SKU: RI-CleanX-R3 Share : Description Specification Documents Description Robot Industries CleanX R3 5-in-1 AI Cleaning Robot Robot Industries, a global leader in advanced robotics with cutting-edge manufacturing and R&D facilities spanning Europe, North America, and Asia, is proud to introduce the CleanX R3 5-IN-1 AI Cleaning Robot Line. This groundbreaking innovation sets a new standard in cleaning efficiency, delivering exceptional performance and effortless integration into modern business operations, all packaged in an intuitive, user-friendly design. THE FUTURE OF CLEANING, TODAY The CleanX R3 is more than just a cleaning robot—it's an all-in-one solution that can be adapted to the usage needs of offices, hotels, factories, hospitals, or government centers. With advanced AI at its core, it seamlessly adapts to different environments, delivering flawless results even in the busiest and most demanding settings. Here’s what makes the CleanX R3 a game-changer: ● Detects and switches cleaning modes automatically for carpets and hard floors.● Navigates elevators, gates, and multi-floor operations independently, making it ideal for large facilities. ● Automatically recharges, drains, and refills through its integrated base station.● It is equipped with advanced sensors to identify and avoid obstacles, ensuring smooth and secure operation. ● Features next-generation lithium iron phosphate batteries for fast charging and extended battery life. DESIGNED FOR RESPONDING TO REAL BUSINESS NEEDSFrom corporate offices to hospitals, schools, and hotels, the CleanX R3 effortlessly handles the demands of modern facilities. Its flexibility and precision make it a valuable asset in spaces where cleanliness and safety are non-negotiable. The CleanX R3 is the ultimate cleaning partner for Factorie/Logistic Centers Offices Commercial Centers Hotels/Public Sector Warehouse Applicable ground Key Features and Technical Specifications: 5-in-1 Cleaning Modes Combining sweeping, mopping, vacuuming, dusting, and Automatic base station built with environmentally friendly materials and designed to use less energy. High Cleaning Efficiency Capable of covering 400-700 sqm/h. The CleanX R3 is able to handle multiple cleaning tasks at the same time, guaranteeing thorough care for different surfaces and environments. Extended Runtime and High-Capacity Tanks The CleanX R3 covers a large area, making it ideal for different types of floors and big spaces: 5h - Scrubbing, 5h - Vacuuming, 18h - Sweeping, 10h - Dust Mopping Clean Water Tank Designed to operate efficiently with little intervention." Waste Water Tank Automatic recharging, refilling the clean water tank, emptying the dirty water tank, emptying the vacuum dustbin, and self-cleaning of the docking system." Advanced AI Navigation System Equipped with Visual SLAM / Laser SLAM a variety of sensors combined with advanced algorithms, efficient detection, faster response, can identify pedestrians, objects, steps, etc., to achieve multiple security guarantees. Benefits: Comprehensive Cleaning 6 liters, ensuring it collects waste efficiently and minimizes downtime. Minimal Maintenance is an advanced cleaning robot equipped with an autonomous docking station, designed to meet the demands of large commercial spaces such as office buildings, hotels, shopping malls, and warehouses. This robot is capable of performing multiple cleaning tasks, including floor washing, sweeping, and vacuuming, while maintaining exceptional cleaning performance. Eco-Friendly and Energy-Efficient The CleanX R3 by Robot Industries is a powerful and intelligent cleaning tool designed for those seeking high-quality, efficient cleaning solutions. Ideal for offices, warehouses, or large homes, the CleanX R3 sets a new standard for cleanliness with its smart technology and premium functionality, making daily maintenance easy and effective. Login or Register to view price ​Request price SKU: N/A Share : Description Specification Description RI WD 3D FreeTeach Industrial Welding Station The Future of Robotic Welding – No Manual Programming Required In today’s industrial environment, where skilled labor shortages, rising costs, and increasing quality demands challenge manufacturers, intelligent welding automation is no longer optional. The RI WD 3D FreeTeach Industrial Welding Station redefines robotic welding by completely eliminating traditional manual programming and transforming welding into a fast, flexible, and efficient process. What is the RI WD 3D FreeTeach Industrial Welding StationThe RI WD 3D FreeTeach is a fully automated industrial welding station equipped with 3D vision technology and intelligent welding path planning software. Unlike traditional “teach & repeat” robotic systems, it: requires no manual welding path programming automatically recognizes part geometry autonomously generates the optimal welding path quickly adapts to different workpieces The result is a dramatic reduction in setup time and consistent welding quality, even for complex parts. FreeTeach Technology – Teach-Free WeldingThe key innovation of the RI WD station is FreeTeach (Teach-Free Welding) technology. The operator no longer needs to manually teach the robot. The system: scans the part using 3D vision automatically detects welding seams calculates optimal welding parameters (speed, current, angle) performs the weld with high precision This approach makes robotic welding accessible even for companies without dedicated robot programmers. Key Features 3D vision system for automatic part recognition Autonomous welding path planning High precision and repeatability (±0.02 mm) Compatibility with multiple industrial robots (RI, FANUC, ABB, Estun, etc.) MIG/MAG welding support (350A – 500A) Advanced welding functions: corner welding, circular welding, multi-pass welding, weaving Automatic torch cleaning system Real Production Benefits Reduced Setup Time Fast configuration for new parts enables quick changeovers between different production batches. Consistent Welding Quality Eliminating manual programming ensures uniform, repeatable welds that meet industrial standards. Login or Register to view price ​Request price SKU: RI-PL-2400-120-NoS-M Share : Description Specification Description RI Industrial Palletizing Cell Modular robotic solution for product palletizing​ RI Industrial Palletizing Cell is a modular solution developed by Robot Industries to automate palletizing operations at the end of production lines.Designed as a flexible platform, the system can be configured from compact palletizing cells to fully automated end-of-line systems, adapted to each customer’s production and logistics flow. Complete automation of the palletizing processIn a fully automated configuration, the system connects directly to the production line and manages the entire palletizing workflow automatically:receiving products from the production linepreparing and positioning products for palletizingrobotic pallet buildingautomatic empty pallet feedingcompleted pallet evacuationpallet stabilization through automatic stretch wrappingtransfer to the finished pallet buffer areaThe system can efficiently handle a wide range of packaged products such as boxes, bags, bundles, or other packaged goods, while the configuration is optimized according to product type, production volume, and existing infrastructure. In this configuration, operator involvement is limited to simple logistics activities such as loading stacks of empty pallets and clearing the finished pallet buffer area. Configurations adapted to each applicationThe modular design of the system allows the solution to be configured according to the requirements of each application.In its simplest configuration, the system may include only the robotic palletizing cell, where the robot automatically builds the pallet while empty and finished pallet handling is performed manually.For more complex applications, the system can be extended with product conveyors, automatic pallet handling, product preparation modules, or pallet stabilization systems.This flexibility allows companies to implement automation gradually, without major modifications to their existing infrastructure. Adapted to different product typesThe RI Industrial Palletizing Cell is configured according to the product being handled.The robot can use different types of grippers to ensure safe and efficient product handling:vacuum grippers for boxes and bundlesmechanical grippers for bagsmultipick grippers for higher productivityDepending on the application, the system may also integrate equipment for product alignment, rotation, or stabilization before palletizing. Integration with RiA Ecosyst​em RI Industrial Palletizing Cell is fully compatible with RiA Ecosystem, the software platform developed by Robot Industries for monitoring and orchestrating automated systems.Through integration with RiA Ecosystem, the palletizing cell becomes part of a digital environment that enables:real-time monitoring of palletizing operationsfull visibility over production and logistics flowsoperational data collection and performance analysisrapid detection of bottlenecks or anomaliescontinuous optimization of material flowAbout RiA Ecosystem The platform allows the palletizing cell to be synchronized with the upstream production flow as well as with downstream logistics processes, whether these are manual operations or performed by autonomous logistics robots.The result is complete operational visibility and the ability to continuously optimize production and pallet handling processes.A solution that grows with your production.Thanks to its modular architecture and digital integration through RiA Ecosystem, the RI Industrial Palletizing Cell can easily evolve from a simple palletizing cell into a fully automated system integrated into the factory’s logistics flow.This approach provides companies with a flexible, scalable solution ready to support the progressive automation of industrial operations.​ Specification Brand Robot Industries or Fanuc or Kawasaki Payload 110 kg or 120 kg or 130 kg or 160 kg or 180 kg Working Radius 2400 mm or 3100 mm Safety package No safety package or Safety KIT (fence, door lock, light tower) or Safety KIT (fence, door lock, light tower) + Endline conveyor Automated pallet flow Manual or Automated flow - Login or Register to view price ​Request price SKU: N/A Share : Description Specification Documents Description RI Collaborative Carton Box Forming Cell Collaborative Robotic Carton Erector for Automated Packaging LinesThe RI Collaborative Carton Box Forming Cell is a fully integrated collaborative robotic carton erector, designed for automated forming of cardboard boxes in industrial packaging environments. The system combines a collaborative robot, intelligent control software, and a compact cell design to deliver reliable, repeatable, and scalable carton forming operations.This solution is optimized for automated packaging lines, end-of-line automation, and logistics workflows requiring flexibility, fast changeovers, and minimal manual intervention. Technical OverviewThe RI Carton Box Forming Cell automates the complete carton erection process, including: picking flat carton blanks, opening and forming the box, positioning the carton for filling or downstream processes. The use of collaborative robot technology allows safe human–robot interaction without traditional safety cages, reducing footprint and simplifying deployment. Key Technical Features – SummaryThe RI Carton Box Forming Cell uses collaborative robot technology to enable safe, fence-free operation in a compact footprint. The system automates carton erection with precise, repeatable performance and stable cycle times.It supports multiple carton sizes with fast mechanical and software changeovers, making it ideal for flexible, high-mix production. Designed for seamless integration, the cell connects easily to conveyors, sealing machines, packing stations, and palletizing systems.An intuitive HMI allows quick setup, monitoring, and parameter adjustment without advanced programming, with optional remote support for maximum uptime. Industrial ApplicationsThe RI Carton Box Forming Cell is designed for use in automated packaging lines where reliable and flexible carton erection is required. It is well suited for logistics and distribution centers, supporting high-throughput operations and efficient order fulfillment.The system is also ideal for e-commerce fulfillment environments, where frequent carton size changes and consistent packaging quality are essential. In FMCG and consumer goods manufacturing, it ensures fast, repeatable box forming for high-volume packaging processes.Additionally, the solution is suitable for industrial and electronics packaging applications, where precision, consistency, and integration with downstream automation are critical. Previous Next Operational BenefitsThe RI Carton Box Forming Cell significantly increases production efficiency by automating the carton erection process. Consistent cycle times and the elimination of manual box forming improve overall line performance and throughput.By automating repetitive and ergonomically demanding tasks, the system reduces dependency on manual labor, lowers operating costs, and minimizes operator fatigue, contributing to a safer and more efficient working environment.High precision and repeatability ensure consistent, high-quality carton forming. This minimizes misaligned boxes, line interruptions, and packaging defects, resulting in improved reliability and reduced waste.The system’s modular and scalable design makes it future-proof, allowing easy expansion and integration with additional automation modules such as carton sealing, labeling, or robotic palletizing as production requirements evolve.
